title: Cirrus: Provide gpg2 in Ubuntu images

comments.body:

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
sigh, still waiting for a fix I guess.
Yep, just saw that fix go in.  rebasing now...
...actually, since the image-building stuff has changed, I need to port this PR over to the "new-way".
...actually, on second-thought.  I'll use this PR to reference the newly built images (from other PR).
@mheon reminder: This is the one w/ images having both crun and runc installed
